skills.name: Latent Power Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Latent Power skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Latent Power skill.

skills.name: Power Prolonger
skills.description: Allows long swords, dual blades, insect glaives, switch axes, and charge blades to stay powered up longer.

levels.description: Slightly increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Increases the duration weapons are powered up.
Greatly increases the duration weapons are powered up.

skills.name: Critical Boost
skills.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.

levels.description: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 35%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%.

skills.name: Latent Power
skills.description: Temporarily increases affinity and reduces stamina depletion when certain conditions are met.

levels.description: While active, increases affinity by 10% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 20% and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
While active, increases affinity by 30% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 40% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50% and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.
While active, increases affinity by 50%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.
While active, increases affinity by 60%, reduces stamina depletion by 50%. Triggers easier.

skills.name: Normal Shots
skills.description: Increases the attack power of normal ammo and normal arrows.

levels.description: Increases the power of normal ammo and normal arrows.
Greatly increases the power of normal ammo and normal arrows.

skills.name: Recovery Speed
skills.description: Speeds healing of recoverable damage (the red portion of the health gauge).

levels.description: Doubles the speed at which you heal recoverable damage.
Triples the speed at which you heal recoverable damage.
Quadruples the speed at which you heal recoverable damage.

skills.name: Thunder Attack
skills.description: Increases thunder element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)
